MOTION FOR LEAVE TO / Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seek Leave To Amend Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-17-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DOMITILA ALVARENGA'S Motion To Seek Leave To Amend Complaint.

The unopposed motion for leave to file a second amended complaint is granted. Plaintiff shall file the document attached as Exhibit B to the Ladva Declaration by March 3, 2026.

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
